data.title: Implement eval-daily-runner.sh with P0 ticket creation and dedup
data.description:
Build the eval-daily-runner.sh script that runs the full eval suite and creates P0 bug tickets on failure.

## Implementation
- Script location: plugins/dso/scripts/eval-daily-runner.sh
- Invoke run-skill-evals.sh --all (Tier 2 mode)
- On success (exit 0): log success, exit 0
- On failure (exit non-zero):
  1. Parse failure count from run-skill-evals.sh output
  2. Generate title: "EVAL REGRESSION: YYYY-MM-DD — N skills failing"
  3. Check for existing open P0 bug with "EVAL REGRESSION:" title prefix:
     - Use: .claude/scripts/dso ticket list | grep for type=bug, priority=0, status=open, title prefix
  4. If existing P0 found: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <id> "Daily eval run YYYY-MM-DD: N skills failing. Details: <summary>"
  5. If no existing P0: .claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug "EVAL REGRESSION: YYYY-MM-DD — N skills failing" --priority=0 -d "<failure details>"
  6. Exit with non-zero code (propagate eval failure)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/eval-daily-runner.sh
- [ ] Script outputs usage on --help
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/eval-daily-runner.sh --help 2>&1 | grep -q 'Usage'
- [ ] RED tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/eval-daily-runner.sh (create)
